quotes.structure: Observational paradox followed by ominous approval and dark proposition.
rhetorical-dna: Three sentences: first longer, next two short and punchy
Opens with ironic observation about the addressee (peaceful sleep contradicting violent nature)
"That's good" pivot creates menacing approval rather than judgment
quotes.respecification-seed: A recruiter approaches someone who has crossed a moral line, offering belonging rather than judgment.

quotes.structure: Formal address + denial that pivots to superior claim.
rhetorical-dna: Two sentences, second half the length of first
Parallel structure with escalating verb (spread to create)
quotes.respecification-seed: A character corrects a misunderstanding of their role by claiming greater power than assumed.

quotes.structure: Evocative imagery command followed by terse identification.
rhetorical-dna: Two sentences: first elaborate and sensory, second blunt
quotes.respecification-seed: A character explains an abstract or divine concept through sensory metaphor.

quotes.structure: Declaration of purpose through ascending triadic list.
rhetorical-dna: Escalation from base (profit) through transgressive (enjoyment) to sacred (glory)
quotes.respecification-seed: A character states their group's ethos, embracing rather than excusing its dark nature.

quotes.structure: Simple identity claim with violent metaphorical elaboration.
rhetorical-dna: "Family" domesticates what follows; the violence becomes intimacy
Register: warm despite content, matter-of-fact about darkness
quotes.respecification-seed: A character welcomes another into a group bound by shared transgression rather than birth.

quotes.structure: Extended contractual metaphor with escalating fragments.
rhetorical-dna: Three units, progressively shorter (full sentence to fragment to fragment)
Legal/signing metaphor sustained through all three
quotes.respecification-seed: A character reframes a violent act as the addressee's binding initiation into an organization.

quotes.structure: Temporal marker + role assignment with possessive claim.
rhetorical-dna: "From this moment forward" creates ritual boundary
Possessive + role title establishes hierarchical intimacy
quotes.respecification-seed: A mentor formally elevates someone to a position of trust and purpose.

quotes.structure: Ominous promise with pause + warm invitation.
rhetorical-dna: Ellipsis creates menacing ambiguity (following you, or your progress?)
Register: controlled, watchful, warmth undercut by implied threat
quotes.respecification-seed: A superior welcomes a new member while making clear they will be observed.

quotes.structure: Benediction/sending with honorific address and mission statement.
rhetorical-dna: Honorific title places addressee in lineage
quotes.respecification-seed: A spiritual authority sends an agent forth on a mission framed as sacred duty.

quotes.structure: Rhetorical question + revelation + call to action.
rhetorical-dna: Shift from authority to apparent vulnerability (may itself be manipulation)
quotes.respecification-seed: An authority figure pivots to seeking alliance when they discover shared victimhood.
